title: Mineral Overhaul: Shellstone & Tuff
description: Adds a few new building blocks that match the vanilla style.
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7265f0f4ea62a95933350e029219f7ea9bd2dff3.png)
### A decorative mod with a few other immersive shenanigans.
Adds a new block called Shellstone - which can be turned into polished or tiles, new tuff variants, and some items similar to the Goat Horn.
![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38c192998d6c27a26c7e6aba13e44a4b2c2a7473.png)
Eventually, this will be an addon for an upcoming mod called Mineral Overhaul, a large expansive mod that upgrades Minecraft's mineral progression.
**(NOTE: As of now, the owner of Mineral Overhaul has discontinued, so this project is standalone.)**
<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>

# Blocks
### _Most blocks like Tuff Tiles/Hardened Tuff will be crafted with the stonecutter to avoid compatibility issues_
## Shellstone
![Shellstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7582b5541f06ce3d7d523a9f15a1eccfb82419d5.png)
![Raw Shellstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/274b07ea372a197548d6a75e55e6c41e6b54f841.png)

![shelltiles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc351f45a4ad433b40f83ae878698f92afdb6ab3.png)
![shellpolished](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f2960adbf3511014315aee7d3fcec08b86f2db9.png)

> the new Raw Shellstone block will spawn near beaches and can be right-clicked with an axe to harvest its shells and turn into a pearly stone.
>
> Raw Shellstone can also be obtained with lily pads, kelp, sand, and seagrass.

## Tuff
![TuffTiles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/421d82931bc284e56d89418a0bf9b6f88adb2c5d.png)
![SmoothTuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6d55d01cd64281b120f1dc8517f00c24189e320.png)
> A few tuff variants have been added, You can make these in the Stonecutter with normal tuff.
</details>




<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

# Items
## Seashell
![Seashell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fff8fbc0d3594f6626869a976bb364ea9963181.png)
> Sometimes obtained by cleaning Raw Shellstone with an axe.
> 
> Plays some familiar sounds
> 
> Can be used as an Armour Trim material for a sandy aesthetic.

## Shell Template
![Shell Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1e36deb94dd58403009f60d752c7b6421181670.png)
> The shell template can be used with Seashells to get a new design![Shell Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1ecffa9fb496d86662aea70438c8199add3f0e3.png)
> 
> Covering almost all of the armour, the Shell Template can only be used with Seashells. As otherwise, that could cause some issues with figuring out what other players wear.

## Netherite Cutlass (Cosmetic)
![Netherite Cutlass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e11d8b7585584452a240d6fef5eb31b19d4a7b62.png)
> The Netherite Cutlass Cosmetic Item can be obtained by crafting a Netherite Sword together with a Nautilus Shell.
However, it can also be right-clicked or shift-clicked to play a few sounds (works with shields). It has the same properties as the Netherite Sword.

>![CutlassRecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e97e1cdae3e50c8bf94e0589b193566ff8a53835.png)

</details>
